rule.desc: Use object with do-nothing behavior instead of None checks.
rule.exceptions: Modern Python uses `Optional[T]` and explicit None checks instead.

rule.desc: Global registry of objects by key.
IoC container managing object creation and dependencies.

examples.example: Simple dict-based container for dependency injection.

rule.desc: Mediates between domain and data mapping layers.
Store state changes as sequence of events.

examples.example: Transaction audit log with all state transitions.
Parser plugins discovered via entry points.

rule.desc: Object wraps database row with data access methods.
rule.exceptions: Prefer repository pattern for better testability (Y233).

rule.desc: All instances share state (alternative to Singleton).

examples.example: Class where all instances access shared class variables.

rule.desc: Dynamic dispatch based on two objects' types.
